action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline score is 483.8 rmse_z500 and current workspace still has the old model/predict code; the planned coord-channel upgrade from the previous reasoning was not yet applied. Analysis: A safe next step is to actually implement the stronger periodic CNN with optional latitude/sine-cosine longitude coordinates, keep checkpoint config self-contained for offline inference, and train a moderate 8-epoch run since the 4-epoch baseline took ~157s. Decision: patch model/train/predict to support coord features and robust checkpoint loading, run 8 epochs with a somewhat larger model, smoke-test predict locally, and submit eval on the new best checkpoint.
